details.test: Task 1: Breast HER2 2023 project with filtered slides high priority
Task 2: Compare Tumor Segmentation v1 vs v2 and set default
Task 3: Create High_PDL1_NSCLC collection with PD-L1 ≥ 10% slides
Task 4: Annotate 4 tumor ROIs ≥ 1.0 mm² on colon slide
Task 5: Generate TIL density heatmap and save TIL_500_cap preset
Task 6: Build Lung_Stage3_4_TumorArea100 cohort via preview/save flow
Task 7: Create Nuclei_Custom_20um_0.35 and assign to project as active
Task 8: Exclude low-focus (focusScore < 0.6) slides from Lung_Imaging_Study_A
Task 9: Export metrics CSV for Tumor Segmentation v2 in Breast HER2 2023 project
